memberdef.argsstring: (UINTPTR BaseAddress, u8 *BufferPtr, unsigned ByteCount, u8 Option)
memberdef.name: RecvData

memberdef.argsstring: (UINTPTR BaseAddress, u8 *BufferPtr, unsigned ByteCount, u8 Option)
memberdef.name: SendData

briefdescription.para: Receive the specified data from the device that has been previously addressed on the IIC bus.

detaileddescription.para:
This function assumes the following:
The Rx Fifo occupancy depth has been set to its max.
Upon entry, the Rx Fifo is empty.
The 7 bit address has been sent.
The dynamic stop and number of bytes to receive has been written to Tx Fifo.

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the IIC Device.
points to the buffer to hold the data that is received.
is the number of bytes to be received. The range of this value is greater than 0 and not higher than 255.

simplesect.para: The number of bytes remaining to be received.
This function contains loops that could cause the function not to return if the hardware is not working.

memberdef.argsstring: (UINTPTR BaseAddress, u8 *BufferPtr, u8 ByteCount, u8 Option)
memberdef.name: DynSendData

memberdef.argsstring: (UINTPTR BaseAddress, u8 Address, u8 *BufferPtr, unsigned ByteCount, u8 Option)
memberdef.name: XIic_Recv

briefdescription.para: Receive data as a master on the IIC bus.

detaileddescription.para: This function receives the data using polled I/O and blocks until the data has been received. It only supports 7 bit addressing mode of operation. This function returns zero if bus is busy.

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the IIC device.
contains the 7 bit IIC address of the device to send the specified data to.
points to the data to be sent.
is the number of bytes to be sent.
indicates whether to hold or free the bus after reception of data, XIIC_STOP = end with STOP condition, XIIC_REPEATED_START = don't end with STOP condition.

memberdef.argsstring: (UINTPTR BaseAddress, u8 Address, u8 *BufferPtr, unsigned ByteCount, u8 Option)
memberdef.name: XIic_Send

briefdescription.para: Send data as a master on the IIC bus.

detaileddescription.para: This function sends the data using polled I/O and blocks until the data has been sent. It only supports 7 bit addressing mode of operation. This function returns zero if bus is busy.

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the IIC device.
contains the 7 bit IIC address of the device to send the specified data to.
points to the data to be sent.
is the number of bytes to be sent.
indicates whether to hold or free the bus after transmitting the data.

memberdef.argsstring: (UINTPTR BaseAddress, u8 Address, u8 *BufferPtr, u8 ByteCount)
memberdef.name: XIic_DynRecv

briefdescription.para: Receive data as a master on the IIC bus.

detaileddescription.para: This function receives the data using polled I/O and blocks until the data has been received. It only supports 7 bit addressing. This function returns zero if bus is busy.

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the IIC Device.
contains the 7 bit IIC Device address of the device to send the specified data to.
points to the data to be sent.
is the number of bytes to be sent. This value can't be greater than 255 and needs to be greater than 0.

simplesect.para: Upon entry to this function, the IIC interface needs to be already enabled in the CR register.

memberdef.argsstring: (UINTPTR BaseAddress, u16 Address, u8 *BufferPtr, u8 ByteCount, u8 Option)
memberdef.name: XIic_DynSend

briefdescription.para: Send data as a master on the IIC bus.

detaileddescription.para: This function sends the data using polled I/O and blocks until the data has been sent. It only supports 7 bit addressing. This function returns zero if bus is busy.

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the IIC Device.
contains the 7 bit IIC address of the device to send the specified data to.
points to the data to be sent.
is the number of bytes to be sent.
XIIC_STOP = end with STOP condition, XIIC_REPEATED_START = don't end with STOP condition.

briefdescription.para: This function will wait until the I2C bus is free or timeout.

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the I2C device.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the I2C bus was freed before the timeout.
